html:
Exclusive to:

The Spectoggles are a Hat Item craftable only by Wagstaff. They are found in the Tinkering Tab and require a Gold Nugget and a Pig Skin to craft. They allow a Wagstaff player to remove the blurriness effect due to Wagstaff's nearsightedness. However, when characters other than Wagstaff wear the Spectoggles, the world will appear blurry. They also reveal hidden dangers such as Tentacles.

Downloadable Content

In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Spectoggles reveal Flups and Poisonous Holes.

In the Hamlet DLC, the Spectoggles reveal Nasty Spear Traps, Striking Carvings, and Pressure Plates. In addition, Peculiar Objects can be revealed, allowing Wagstaff to investigate Peculiar Objects. This can be done at no cost to item durability. The goggles also provide immunity to Fog.

Gallery

  • Spectoggle Equipped
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

plainText:
Exclusive to:
Spectoggles
"Basic super goggles. Reveal hidden danger."
Object Info
Perk
Reveal hidden dangers and removes blurriness.
Investigates Peculiar Objects.
Prevents slowdown from Heavy Fog when body slot items are equipped.
Equipable
10 days
Does not stack
Crafting
×1 ×1
Tab
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"gogglesnormalhat"
“Seems useless.”
–Wilson, when examining the Spectoggles
“Good for nothing except burning.”
–Willow, when examining the Spectoggles
“Is giving Wolfgang headache.”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Spectoggles
“Useless. Just like life.”
–Wendy, when examining the Spectoggles
“IT REQUIRES A SOFTWARE UPDATE”
–WX-78, when examining the Spectoggles
“I'm afraid they're not my prescription.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Spectoggles
“What's the point of this, eh?”
–Woodie, when examining the Spectoggles
“I hardly see the need for these.”
–Maxwell, when examining the Spectoggles
“Refracted lenses polished to a specific curvature so I can see better.”
–Wagstaff, when examining the Spectoggles
“It möcks me with its pöintlessness!”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Spectoggles
“Haha! It makes us see all funny.”
–Webber, when examining the Spectoggles
“Seems like a lotta work for nothing.”
–Walani, when examining the Spectoggles
“Can't see the point in these.”
–Warly, when examining the Spectoggles
“T'be of no use t'me.”
–Woodlegs, when examining the Spectoggles
“WHATFORE ART THIS FOR?”
–Wilba, when examining the Spectoggles
“Hehe. Funny eyes”
–Wormwood, when examining the Spectoggles
“Why would I want to make everything blurry?”
–Wheeler, when examining the Spectoggles
The Spectoggles are a Hat Item craftable only by Wagstaff. They are found in the Tinkering Tab and require a Gold Nugget and a Pig Skin to craft. They allow a Wagstaff player to remove the blurriness effect due to Wagstaff's nearsightedness. However, when characters other than Wagstaff wear the Spectoggles, the world will appear blurry. They also reveal hidden dangers such as Tentacles.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Shipwrecked DLC, the Spectoggles reveal Flups and Poisonous Holes.
In the Hamlet DLC, the Spectoggles reveal Nasty Spear Traps, Striking Carvings, and Pressure Plates. In addition, Peculiar Objects can be revealed, allowing Wagstaff to investigate Peculiar Objects. This can be done at no cost to item durability. The goggles also provide immunity to Fog.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Kính Đeo Mắt là Vật Phẩm Mũ chỉ có thể chế tạo bởi Wagstaff. Chúng được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Tinkering và cần có Vàng Thỏi và Da Lợn để chế tạo. Chúng cho phép người chơi Wagstaff loại bỏ hiệu ứng mờ do chứng cận thị của Wagstaff. Tuy nhiên, khi các nhân vật không phải Wagstaff đeo Kính bảo hộ, thế giới sẽ mờ đi. Chúng còn bộc lộ những mối nguy hiểm tiềm ẩn như Xúc tu.
